title: TrustGraph AI - Animated Image Background
prompt:
Replace the existing particle background/shader with a layered atmospheric background using the image {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_12}}. 

Implementation details:
1. Create a fixed background container at the lowest z-index.
2. Inside, place a full-screen image using {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_12}} with object-cover and a subtle scale-up animation (breathing effect).
3. Overlay the image with a semi-transparent dark gradient (radial-gradient) to ensure high text contrast, especially in the center.
4. Add a secondary "fog" or "glow" layer using a CSS-animated blur that slowly drifts, creating a sense of depth and motion.
5. Ensure all existing UI elements (nav, hero, cards, sections) are layered on top and remain fully readable.
6. Remove any old shader-related script tags or canvas elements to clean up.

designSystem.styleGuidelines:
## Brand & Style
The brand personality is authoritative, clear, and accessible. It draws from a **Corporate / Modern** aesthetic, prioritizing information density and readability above all else. The target audience includes researchers, students, and professionals who require a reliable, distraction-free environment for consuming and organizing knowledge. The visual style is balanced and professional, utilizing a sophisticated dark mode to reduce eye strain during long-form reading sessions.

## Layout & Spacing
The system utilizes a **fluid grid** model that adapts to the viewport while maintaining strict reading widths for content blocks. Spacing is based on a **2px base unit**, emphasizing a compact and information-dense layout. Gutters are set to 16px to maintain clear separation between columns, while margins are set to 24px to provide adequate breathing room on mobile devices.

## Elevation & Depth
In this dark-themed environment, depth is conveyed through **tonal layers** rather than heavy shadows. Higher elevation levels are represented by slightly lighter shades of the neutral palette. Surfaces closer to the user utilize subtle, low-contrast outlines (#54595d) to define boundaries without breaking the immersive dark aesthetic.

## Components
- **Buttons:** Primary buttons use the #3366cc blue with white text and 8px rounded corners.
- **Cards:** Use a slightly elevated neutral tone with subtle borders to group related information.
- **Inputs:** Dark backgrounds with #54595d borders, shifting to #3366cc on focus.
- **Lists:** Clean, tight vertical spacing with subtle dividers to facilitate rapid scanning.

# Design System: Modern Wiki

## Brand & Style
The brand personality is authoritative, clear, and accessible. It draws from a **Corporate / Modern** aesthetic, prioritizing information density and readability above all else. The target audience includes researchers, students, and professionals who require a reliable, distraction-free environment for consuming and organizing knowledge. The visual style is balanced and professional, utilizing a sophisticated dark mode to reduce eye strain during long-form reading sessions.

## Colors
The color palette is optimized for a high-performance **dark mode** experience. 
- **Primary (#3366cc):** An authoritative blue used for primary actions, links, and branding, ensuring high visibility against dark backgrounds.
- **Secondary (#54595d):** A muted slate grey used for supporting UI elements and secondary navigation.
- **Tertiary (#fee77e):** A soft yellow used sparingly for highlights, warnings, or specialized callouts to provide a warm counterpoint to the cool primary tones.
- **Neutral (#202122):** A deep charcoal that serves as the foundational surface color, providing a stable, low-glare backdrop for text.

## Typography
The typography system uses a tiered approach to distinguish between narrative content and interface elements. 
- **Headlines:** Set in **Noto Serif** to provide an editorial, trustworthy feel for article titles and section headers.
- **Body:** Set in **Inter**, a highly legible sans-serif optimized for screen reading, ensuring clarity in long-form text.
- **Labels:** Set in **Public Sans** for functional UI elements, metadata, and buttons, providing a clean and neutral tone for navigation.

## Layout & Spacing
The system utilizes a **fluid grid** model that adapts to the viewport while maintaining strict reading widths for content blocks. Spacing is based on a **2px base unit**, emphasizing a compact and information-dense layout. Gutters are set to 16px to maintain clear separation between columns, while margins are set to 24px to provide adequate breathing room on mobile devices.

## Elevation & Depth
In this dark-themed environment, depth is conveyed through **tonal layers** rather than heavy shadows. Higher elevation levels are represented by slightly lighter shades of the neutral palette. Surfaces closer to the user utilize subtle, low-contrast outlines (#54595d) to define boundaries without breaking the immersive dark aesthetic.

## Shapes
The UI employs a **Rounded** shape language. Standard components feature a 0.5rem (8px) corner radius, striking a balance between modern friendliness and professional structure. Larger containers like cards use 1rem (16px) for a distinct, framed appearance.

## Components
- **Buttons:** Primary buttons use the #3366cc blue with white text and 8px rounded corners.
- **Cards:** Use a slightly elevated neutral tone with subtle borders to group related information.
- **Inputs:** Dark backgrounds with #54595d borders, shifting to #3366cc on focus.
- **Lists:** Clean, tight vertical spacing with subtle dividers to facilitate rapid scanning.
